**Notes on artifact state (informational, all stories done):**
- `2-1-1`, `2-1-2`: No ATDD checklist — these predate the ATDD workflow step in their pipeline run.
- `2-1-1`: No review.md — review embedded in session summary.
- `2-2-1`, `7-1-1`: No progress.md — stories completed without a separate progress file.
- `7-2-1`: No progress.md — story finalized 2026-03-07; session-summary.md now confirmed present on disk (updated from prior audit).
- `7-1-1`: ATDD uses emoji-based status table (🟢/⬜) rather than `[x]/[ ]` checkboxes — all functional, standard, and NFR ACs show 🟢 GREEN.
- `2-2-1`: One `[ ]` in atdd.md is in a metadata table row (`implementation_checklist_complete: FALSE (all items [ ] — ready for implementation)`), not an unchecked implementation task.
- No `.paw/*.feedback.md` files found — no pipeline regressions across all sprint-2 stories.
- No `.paw/logs/` files for sprint-2 stories — pipeline ran in interactive (non-paw-runner) mode; log-based gap checks (Steps 6.5.2–6.5.6) are not applicable.
- `pencil.enabled: true` in `_bmad/pcc/config.yaml` — pen sidecar checks apply for frontend/fullstack stories. Sprint-2 stories are all backend/infrastructure (cpp-cmake enabler/feature type); no pen sidecar expected.
- AC compliance YAMLs: none present for any sprint-2 story — cpp-cmake tech profile uses `skip_checks: [build, test]`.
- No contract preservation reports found in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/`.

## Step 10 — Next Steps

Sprint is HEALTHY with 0 active stories. Suggested actions:

- If sprint is fully complete: `./paw sprint-complete` — record velocity and close Sprint 2
- If new backlog work is being pulled in: update `sprint-status.yaml` and re-run `./paw sprint-health-audit scope=active`
- If retrospective is desired: `./paw sprint-retrospective`
- After remediation (if any future gaps arise): re-run `./paw sprint-health-audit` and loop until HEALTHY, then run `sprint-complete`
